title: Coastal Source Opens Showroom at Pacific Design Center
bodyHtml:
Coastal Source Expands Presence at Pacific Design Center

Coastal Source has expanded its presence at the Pacific Design Center, showcasing a range of high-quality outdoor audio, video, and lighting products. This move highlights the company’s commitment to providing top-tier solutions for outdoor living spaces, making it easier for designers and integrators to access their innovative products.

‍

Product Showcase

The newly renovated showroom at the Pacific Design Center features an array of Coastal Source’s latest offerings, from robust outdoor speakers to durable lighting solutions designed to withstand the elements. The setup is aimed at inspiring visitors to envision the potential of their outdoor spaces with these high-performance products.

‍

AVIR’s Role in Bringing the Pacific Design Center to the Desert

AVIR, a key partner with several brands featured at the Pacific Design Center, plays a crucial role in bringing this curated selection to the desert region. With their extensive product range, careful curation, and expertise, AVIR ensures that homeowners and designers in the desert can experience a comparable level of innovation and quality available at the design center.

The recently renovated AVIR showroom is a testament to this commitment. It offers a hands-on experience with products from leading brands, providing a comprehensive look at the latest in AV solutions. This makes AVIR a go-to destination for those looking to enhance their living spaces with cutting-edge technology and design.

‍

Conclusion

The expansion of Coastal Source at the Pacific Design Center, coupled with AVIR’s extensive product offerings and showroom experience, brings a new level of outdoor living sophistication to the desert. This partnership not only highlights the best in AV technology but also makes it accessible to a wider audience, ensuring that premium outdoor entertainment and lighting solutions are just a visit away.
